title: Tilburg University
text: Home * Organizations * Tilburg University Tilburg University [1] Tilburg University , a public research university specializing in the social and behavioral sciences , economics , law , business sciences, theology and humanities , located in Tilburg [2] , North Brabant , The Netherlands . The university was founded in 1927 as the Roman Catholic University of Commerce , in 1938, 1963 and 1986 renamed to Catholic Economic University , Catholic University Tilburg and Catholic University Brabant respectively, to finally carry the current name in 2002.
